rules.rule: Brokers must be tested through replaceable interface contracts or integration tests.
Foundation services must have unit tests for logic, validation, and exception paths.
View services must have unit tests for aggregation and view model shaping.
Components must be tested through visible behavior — not implementation details.
Pages must be tested for loading, error, empty, and successful render states.
Tests must not target React internals (state names, hook counts, refs).
Large snapshot tests must not be the primary proof of correctness.
Mocks must only be placed at architectural boundaries (broker or service interfaces).
